ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If this option is enabled, the placeholder text will be deleted                     automatically when you start typing a new annotation. If disabled,                     the placeholder text will be selected for easier replacement.                     This is a minor customization.
ast.target: 如果启用此选项，当您开始输入新注释时，占位符文本将自动删除。如果禁用，占位符文本将被选中以便于替换。这是一项小的自定义设置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If this option is enabled, aclickable icon linking to the plugin's GitHub page will be displayed in the Community plugin pane.
ast.target: 如果启用此选项，社区插件面板中将显示一个可点击的图标，链接到该插件的 GitHub 页面。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If you plan to reinstall the plugin in the future,                 it is recommended not to remove your annotations, as you can reuse them later.
ast.target: 如果您计划将来重新安装该插件，建议不要删除您的注释，因为您以后可以重复使用它们。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Store annotations in a Markdown file
ast.target: 将注释存储在 Markdown 文件中

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Allows writing annotations (just like this one) about the community plugins installed in the vault.
ast.target: 允许为保险库中安装的社区插件编写注释（就像这个一样）。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Error: the filename must end with .md extension.
ast.target: 错误：文件名必须以 .md 扩展名结尾。

ast.name: text
ast.source: On mobile devices, you can hover over plugins with your finger instead of using the mouse.
ast.target: 在移动设备上，您可以用手指悬停在插件上，而不是使用鼠标。
